title: How to Handle Negative Google Reviews: A Complete Business Guide
titleZh: 如何處理 Google 負面評論：商家完整指南
targetQuery: how to handle negative google reviews, respond to bad reviews, negative review strategy
metaDescription: Learn how to handle negative Google reviews with a proven strategy. This guide covers response frameworks, removal policies, and turning critics into loyal customers to protect your business reputation.
author: Sarah Kim
